name: Feature request

## What would you like gurmukhifix to do?

<!-- Describe the capability. e.g. a new confusion rule, support for another
script or OCR format, a CLI/API improvement. -->

## The problem it solves

<!-- What OCR error or workflow gap does this address? A concrete example of the
input and the desired corrected output is ideal. -->

```text
# example OCR input → desired corrected output
```

## Language / script

<!-- Which script(s) does this concern? gurmukhi, punjabi, hindi, devanagari,
urdu, farsi, or a new one. -->

## How it stays safe

<!-- IMPORTANT: gurmukhifix will never silently corrupt correct text. Any new
correction must clear the evidence gate — scripture is locked, substitutions need
a validity gain or a dictionary hit, re-orderings are safe. If your idea is a new
correction rule, briefly note what evidence would justify it firing, so it can
never rewrite a valid word. -->

## Alternatives / prior art

<!-- Other ways you've considered, or how another tool handles this. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — links, sample scans (no personal data), references. -->
